[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111 6
1 1110111 6
2 0110111 5
3 1110111 6
4 1100010 3
5 1000111 4
6 1101000 3
7 0101111 5

45 54 1010010 3
56 65 0110010 3
67 76 1110111 6 match 0 1 3
70 07 0100101 3

02 20 1101000 3 match 6

24 42 1011010 4

46 64 1100000 2
